---
title: "Stories"
listing:
  contents: stories
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [title, date, description]
---

NYC Open Data Stories is a public-facing collection of civic data analyses exploring New York City through reproducible workflows in R and Quarto.

Each story begins with a question and uses publicly available data from the NYC Open Data Portal to produce clear, accessible, and transparent insights about the city.

These projects are developed by students and contributors of the NYC Open Data Lab and are designed to be reproducible, interpretable, and meaningful beyond the classroom.

Browse the latest stories below.
